name: P-Video-Avatar
description: Pruna's P-Video-Avatar generates talking-head videos from a single portrait image driven by a text script or audio file, with multiple voices, languages, and output resolutions.

examples.name: Product Demo Greeting
examples.description: Generate a talking-head video from a portrait and a short voice script.

input.voice_script: Hello, welcome to our product demo!

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

audio.description: URL of uploaded audio to drive speech. HTTP(S) URL or data URI. If both audio and voice_script are provided, audio takes priority.

disable_prompt_upsampling.description: When true, skip the prompt upsampler and pass the raw user prompt.

disable_safety_filter.description: Disable safety filter for prompts and input image.

image.description: Input portrait image (first frame). HTTP(S) URL or data URI. Supports jpg, jpeg, png, webp.

negative_prompt.description: Mention what you do NOT want in the video. Disabled if empty.

voice_prompt.description: Optional speaking style, tone, pacing or emotion instructions.

voice_script.description: Script for the person to say when no audio is uploaded.

video.description: Presigned URL for the generated avatar video.
